name: @app-manager/desktop
description: Cross-platform desktop app manager built with Electron, Rust sidecar, and React.
author: ZhcChen <chen1406736605@gamil.com>

scripts.dev: pnpm build:sidecar:dev && concurrently -k -n renderer,electron-build,electron -c blue,yellow,green "pnpm dev:renderer" "pnpm dev:electron:watch" "pnpm dev:electron:run"
scripts.dev:electron:run: wait-on tcp:1430 dist-electron/main.cjs dist-electron/preload.cjs && cross-env ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:1430 electron dist-electron/main.cjs
scripts.preview:mac: pnpm build && pnpm build:sidecar:release && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --dir --mac && node ./scripts/open-macos-preview.mjs
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm build && pnpm build:sidecar:release && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac --publish never
scripts.dist:win: pnpm build && pnpm build:sidecar:release && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: pnpm build && pnpm build:sidecar:release && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --linux --publish never
scripts.dist: pnpm build && pnpm build:sidecar:release && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
